meta.title: Date Calculator | D-Day, Date Difference, Day of Week, Age
meta.description: Free D-Day calculation, date difference, add/subtract dates, and age calculator.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Text: "Date Calculator" (hereinafter "Service") is a free online tool that provides D-Day calculation, date difference, date add/subtract, and more. The Service processes user personal information to a minimum and manages it in accordance with the following policy.
privacy.section2Text1: The Service does not require registration. Data entered by users is not stored on servers and is processed only within the browser.
privacy.section2Text2: However, for service improvement and usage statistics analysis, the following visit data may be automatically collected through Google Analytics.
privacy.section2Item2: Browser type, operating system, screen resolution
privacy.section3Item1: Understanding service usage and statistical analysis
privacy.section3Item2: Improving service quality and user experience
privacy.section3Item3: Error detection and technical problem resolution
privacy.section4Text: Data collected through Google Analytics is processed according to Google's data retention policy, with a default retention period of 14 months. The service operator does not maintain a separate personal information database.
privacy.section5Text: The Service uses Google Analytics, a web analytics service provided by Google Inc. Google Analytics uses cookies to collect website usage information, which is transmitted to and stored on Google servers. For more details, please refer to the
privacy.section6Text: The Service may use cookies for the operation of Google Analytics and Google AdSense. Cookies are small data files stored in the user's browser, used for service usage analysis and personalized advertising. Users may refuse cookie storage through browser settings, but some features may be limited in this case.
privacy.section7Text: For inquiries regarding personal information processing, please contact us at the email below.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.article1Text: These terms set forth the conditions and procedures for using "Date Calculator" (hereinafter "Service"). The Service provides users with free online tools including D-Day calculation, date difference, date add/subtract, and more.
terms.article2Text: All results provided by the Service are for reference purposes only and do not replace professional consultation. Data entered by users is not stored on servers and is processed only within the browser.
terms.article3Item1: Results provided by the Service are for reference only, and their accuracy or completeness is not guaranteed.
terms.article3Item2: Calculation results are for reference only and may differ in special cases such as holidays or leap years.
terms.article3Item3: The service operator is not responsible for any direct or indirect damages arising from the use of the Service.
terms.article4Text: All intellectual property rights to content included in the Service (design, text, source code, logos, etc.) belong to the service operator. Users may not reproduce, distribute, modify, or commercially use them without prior written consent from the service operator.
terms.article5Text: The service operator may change or suspend all or part of the Service as needed for operational or technical reasons. The service operator has no obligation to compensate users for damages resulting from service changes or suspension.
terms.article6Text: The Service may include advertisements such as Google AdSense to cover operating costs. Transactions through advertisements are between users and advertisers, and the service operator is not responsible for them.
terms.article7Text: The service operator may change these terms within the scope not violating relevant laws, and the changed terms take effect upon notice within the Service.
terms.article8Text: For inquiries regarding these terms, please contact us at the email below.
